## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager interview with Khadijah Plummer for Technical Managing Editor role at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/FBzZ6Sa7i_xZKJkf22FHpkLAj7L8esNz?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Role involves editorial work, project management, and improving AI content generation processes](https://fathom.video/share/FBzZ6Sa7i_xZKJkf22FHpkLAj7L8esNz?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [Khadijah has strong editorial background but limited experience with AI content generation at scale](https://fathom.video/share/FBzZ6Sa7i_xZKJkf22FHpkLAj7L8esNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
  - [Next steps: Explore freelance opportunity to evaluate Khadijah's AI-assisted content skills](https://fathom.video/share/FBzZ6Sa7i_xZKJkf22FHpkLAj7L8esNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)

## Topics

### Role Overview

  - [Mix of editorial, project management, and process improvement](https://fathom.video/share/FBzZ6Sa7i_xZKJkf22FHpkLAj7L8esNz?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [Managing editor oversees 3-5 content managers and accounts](https://fathom.video/share/FBzZ6Sa7i_xZKJkf22FHpkLAj7L8esNz?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [Responsible for shaping/editing content, project management, and client communication](https://fathom.video/share/FBzZ6Sa7i_xZKJkf22FHpkLAj7L8esNz?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [Works with account director overseeing \~10 accounts](https://fathom.video/share/FBzZ6Sa7i_xZKJkf22FHpkLAj7L8esNz?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [Focus on blog content, not podcasts/social media](https://fathom.video/share/FBzZ6Sa7i_xZKJkf22FHpkLAj7L8esNz?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)

### Khadijah's Background

  - [Experience in sales, agency work, and content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/FBzZ6Sa7i_xZKJkf22FHpkLAj7L8esNz?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Progressed from marketing generalist to content marketing specialist/manager](https://fathom.video/share/FBzZ6Sa7i_xZKJkf22FHpkLAj7L8esNz?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [Strong editorial skills but limited experience with AI-assisted content generation at scale](https://fathom.video/share/FBzZ6Sa7i_xZKJkf22FHpkLAj7L8esNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
  - [Comfortable with traditional content strategy and SEO tools (SEMrush, Ahrefs)](https://fathom.video/share/FBzZ6Sa7i_xZKJkf22FHpkLAj7L8esNz?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)

### Content Strategy Approach

  - [Khadijah plans quarterly themes tied to yearly goals](https://fathom.video/share/FBzZ6Sa7i_xZKJkf22FHpkLAj7L8esNz?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
  - [Focuses on 3-5 keywords per quarter](https://fathom.video/share/FBzZ6Sa7i_xZKJkf22FHpkLAj7L8esNz?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
  - [Creates content calendar with mix of blog posts, case studies, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/FBzZ6Sa7i_xZKJkf22FHpkLAj7L8esNz?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
  - [Limited experience generating high volumes (60-100 pieces/quarter) with AI assistance](https://fathom.video/share/FBzZ6Sa7i_xZKJkf22FHpkLAj7L8esNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)

### AI Integration Concerns

  - [Khadijah didn't use AI for take-home exercise, raising concerns](https://fathom.video/share/FBzZ6Sa7i_xZKJkf22FHpkLAj7L8esNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
  - [GrowthX heavily relies on AI for content generation (5 pieces/week/client)](https://fathom.video/share/FBzZ6Sa7i_xZKJkf22FHpkLAj7L8esNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
  - [Success in role requires embracing AI tools for efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/FBzZ6Sa7i_xZKJkf22FHpkLAj7L8esNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Andi to update exercise instructions to clarify AI usage expectations](https://fathom.video/share/FBzZ6Sa7i_xZKJkf22FHpkLAj7L8esNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)
  - [Marilia to contact Khadijah about freelance editing opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/FBzZ6Sa7i_xZKJkf22FHpkLAj7L8esNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)
  - [Khadijah to provide freelance rates and availability](https://fathom.video/share/FBzZ6Sa7i_xZKJkf22FHpkLAj7L8esNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1294.0)
  - [2-month evaluation period of Khadijah's AI-assisted content work](https://fathom.video/share/FBzZ6Sa7i_xZKJkf22FHpkLAj7L8esNz?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
